headline: McDonald's Value Push And Mario Tie In Versus Recent Share Weakness
summary: McDonald's is introducing new U.S. menu items priced at $3 or less and $4 breakfast meal deals starting in April, aimed at cost conscious diners. The company is also rolling out a new Happy Meal collaboration with Nintendo's Mario franchise ahead of the Super Mario Galaxy Movie. Together, the value push and branded promotion are designed to support customer traffic and loyalty amid economic headwinds. For investors watching NYSE:MCD, these moves come at a time when the stock trades around...

headline: How to Win the Loser’s Game
summary: How good do you think your chances are of guessing the best-performing stock of the next 100 years?  The winning stock might not exist yet: Today’s superstars like  Nvidia  Apple  Microsoft  and leading consumer brands like  Nike  McDonald’  and  Walmart  weren’t even a twinkle in their founders’ eyes in 1926.  One dollar invested 100 years ago in cigarette maker Philip Morris (now  Altria  ) turned into $4.42 million by the end of last year, including dividends and spinoffs.
